calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. Notice Of Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s (Lyft) motion to compel arbitration is granted. The proceedings in this case are ordered stayed pending arbitration. (9 U.S.C. sec. 3.)

(see word minutes for full details)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
